title: Multimodal Biometrics
html: Stub. Combining two or more biometric signals (e.g. face + fingerprint, or fingerprints from multiple fingers) to keep accuracy from collapsing as the population scales. The Jain/Pankanti/Prabhakar survey argues this is the only viable path for large-scale identification (vs verification). First mentioned in 2025 04 27 biometrics fmr fnmr cost benefit.

related.label: Biometrics survey — FMR/FNMR, identification vs verification, cost-benefit
Jain paper — Fig.9 five multimodal scenarios
Jain paper — multimodal biometrics + levels of fusion
